ncs_standard_definition.description_short: Designs and develops structural systems for buildings and bridges, ensuring safety and stability.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: Structural Engineers in Architecture design and develop structural systems for buildings and bridges, ensuring safety and stability. They analyze loads, stresses, and strains on structures, and develop plans and specifications for construction.

first_stepper.description: High school students interested in pursuing a career in Structural Engineering.

choice_maker.description: Individuals with a generic degree, looking to transition into Structural Engineering.

future_builder.description: Experienced Structural Engineers looking to advance in their careers.
future_builder.prerequisite_experience: Minimum 2 years of experience as a Structural Engineer

problem_solver_uturn.description: Individuals from unrelated fields looking to transition into Structural Engineering.
survival_skills_needed: Programming skills in Python or MATLAB
portfolio_proof_required: Structural analysis projects using software like STAAD or ETABS

roadmap.title: Capstone & Portfolio
topics: Structural analysis project using software like STAAD or ETABS
